ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Add Beta plugin with frozen version
ast.target: Add Beta plugin with frozen version

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled beta plugins will be automatically enabled after installtion by default. Note: you can toggle this on and off for each plugin in the "Add Plugin" form.
ast.target: If enabled beta plugins will be automatically enabled after installtion by default. Note: you can toggle this on and off for each plugin in the "Add Plugin" form.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled all beta plugins will be checked for updates each time Obsidian starts. Note: this does not update frozen version plugins.
ast.target: If enabled all beta plugins will be checked for updates each time Obsidian starts. Note: this does not update frozen version plugins.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: BRAT will provide popup notifications for its various activities. Turn this off means  no notifications from BRAT.
ast.target: BRAT will provide popup notifications for its various activities. Turn this off means  no notifications from BRAT.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Plugin updates will be logged to a file in the log file.
ast.target: Plugin updates will be logged to a file in the log file.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Logs will be saved to this file. Don't add .md to the file name.
ast.target: Logs will be saved to this file. Don't add .md to the file name.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get a lot  more information in  the log.
ast.target: Get a lot  more information in  the log.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Atomic Bomb level console logging. Can be used for troubleshoting and development.
ast.target: Atomic Bomb level console logging. Can be used for troubleshoting and development.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you need to access private repositories, enter the personal access token here.
ast.target: If you need to access private repositories, enter the personal access token here.

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Add a beta plugin for testing
ast.target: Plugins: Add a beta plugin for testing

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Add a beta plugin with frozen version based on a release tag
ast.target: Plugins: Add a beta plugin with frozen version based on a release tag

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Check for updates to all beta plugins and UPDATE
ast.target: Plugins: Check for updates to all beta plugins and UPDATE

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Only check for updates to beta plugins, but don't Update
ast.target: Plugins: Only check for updates to beta plugins, but don't Update

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Choose a single plugin version to update
ast.target: Plugins: Choose a single plugin version to update

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Choose a single plugin to reinstall
ast.target: Plugins: Choose a single plugin to reinstall

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Restart a plugin that is already installed
ast.target: Plugins: Restart a plugin that is already installed

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Disable a plugin - toggle it off
ast.target: Plugins: Disable a plugin - toggle it off

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Enable a plugin - toggle it on
ast.target: Plugins: Enable a plugin - toggle it on

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Open the GitHub repository for a plugin
ast.target: Plugins: Open the GitHub repository for a plugin

ast.name: text
ast.source: The following is a list of beta plugins added via the command palette "Add a beta plugin for testing" or "Add a beta plugin with frozen version for testing". A frozen version is a specific release of a plugin based on its release tag.
ast.target: The following is a list of beta plugins added via the command palette "Add a beta plugin for testing" or "Add a beta plugin with frozen version for testing". A frozen version is a specific release of a plugin based on its release tag.

ast.name: text
ast.source: This does not delete the plugin, this should be done from the  Community Plugins tab in Settings.
ast.target: This does not delete the plugin, this should be done from the  Community Plugins tab in Settings.
